title: [Maelstrom Bay, Surface]
description: The sea swells break lazily against the stony base of a low cliff wall.  The cliff runs from the southeast to the northwest, where it gradually forms a rolling headland.  The tiled roof of a tower is visible above the headland to the northwest.  The green waters of Maelstrom Bay, muted by the moonlight, stretch out to the west.

The sea swells break lazily against the stony base of a low cliff wall.  The cliff runs from the southeast to the northwest, where it gradually forms a rolling headland.  The tiled roof of a tower is visible above the headland to the northwest.  The green waters of Maelstrom Bay, bright in the sunlight, stretch out to the west.
paths: Obvious paths: south, southwest, west, northwest, down

wayto.11451: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'south' else move 'swim south' end; waitrt?
wayto.11453: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'northwest' else move 'swim northwest' end; waitrt?
wayto.11454: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'west' else move 'swim west' end; waitrt?
wayto.11455: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'southwest' else move 'swim southwest' end; waitrt?
